name: cursor-glyph-trail
title: Cursor Glyph Trail
description: An actor travels an authored path depositing small dithered glyphs at its past positions, each popping in and decaying in place, stamp rate scaling with the actor's velocity.
evidence: Wave L1 frame study: jh3yy stamp-and-decay contact sheet (2069614221747224613/sheet-01)

variables.label: Glyphs
variables.description: Stamp charset; one glyph per stamp is chosen deterministically.

variables.label: Density
variables.description: Arc-length spacing between stamps along the path.

variables.label: Fade
variables.description: Per-stamp decay window in seconds, clamped 0.3 to 1.5.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Trail and actor color: green rides --brand, blue rides --accent, violet rides --accent-2.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Default none: the settled actor holds until the frame cuts.
